name: City Glass
description: City Glass is a prominent manufacturer of high-quality glassware, specializing in premium Soda-Lime glass products. Their diverse range includes kitchenware and tableware items, highlighting their commitment to craftsmanship and artistic designs.

name: SARL GLASS DESIGN
description: SARL GLASS DESIGN is a manufacturer that specializes in various products, including double glazing, which is directly related to glass. The company focuses on providing durable and energy-efficient solutions for architects and construction firms.

name: Decorative Glass
description: The company specializes in glass fabrication and mass production, offering a diverse range of design solutions that highlight the unique qualities of glass. With a commitment to innovation and the latest technologies, it enhances the aesthetic and functional aspects of glass, making it a focal point in design and art.

name: Guardian Industries
description: Guardian Industries is a global manufacturer that specializes in high-performance float glass and various coated and fabricated glass products for architectural and residential applications.

name: Glass America
description: Glass America is a prominent player in the auto glass repair and replacement industry, offering a wide range of services for all vehicle types. They utilize high-quality OEM glass and provide convenient mobile service, ensuring customer satisfaction and a lifetime warranty on their workmanship.

name: Pittsburgh Glass Works
description: Pittsburgh Glass Works, LLC (PGW) is a prominent manufacturer in the automotive glass industry, specializing in windshields, windows, and sunroofs. With a strong distribution network and a commitment to quality and innovation, PGW serves major car manufacturers and provides extensive glass shop accessories.

name: Saint-Gobain India Private Limited - Glass Business
description: Saint-Gobain India Pvt Ltd is a prominent player in the glass industry, boasting extensive manufacturing capabilities and a diverse product range that includes clear, tinted, and reflective glass, as well as specialized solutions like fire safety glass and eco-friendly mirrors. With a commitment to innovation and sustainability, the company provides high-performing glass products suitable for various applications across commercial, residential, and public spaces.

name: Glassolutions Saint Gobain
description: GLASSOLUTIONS is a key player in the glazing industry, offering a wide range of glass products, including innovative switchable privacy glass known as PRIVA-LITE. This specialized glass is designed for applications that require discretion, making it ideal for modular partitioning and other settings.

name: GGI (General Glass International)
description: GGI is a specialized manufacturer and distributor of a wide range of glass products, including architectural, specialty, and decorative glass. They also offer custom fabrication and innovative solutions, making them a key player in the glass industry.

name: PG SmartGlass
description: PG Smartglass® is a prominent wholesaler and distributor in South Africa, specializing in high-performance glass products such as laminated, double glazed, and toughened glass. The company also offers expert technical specification services for architectural projects, ensuring quick turnaround and support for installation.
